回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 語言與文化 (Language and Culture)	開課班級 : 應英四甲	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 羅主恩	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
At the conclusion of this course, students will be able to: 1. Demonstrate familiarity with the theory of linguistic relativity and be able to articulate the potential flaws and strengths of the theory 2. Be able to express how various aspects of culture can affect language and that language can affect culture. 3. Be able to articulate how culture death and language death are interrelated and give examples 4. Be able to give examples from other cultures of how language and culture have affected one another 5. Be able to critically assess their own culture and language and point out examples where their culture and language affect one another 6. Implement new vocabulary words in personal writing.  


2.教學綱要
At the conclusion of this course, students will be able to:

1. Demonstrate familiarity with the theory of linguistic relativity and be able to articulate the potential flaws and strengths of the theory
2. Be able to express how various aspects of culture can affect language and that language can affect culture.
3. Be able to articulate how culture death and language death are interrelated and give examples
4. Be able to give examples from other cultures of how language and culture have affected one another
5. Be able to critically assess their own culture and language and point out examples where their culture and language affect one another
6. Implement new vocabulary words in personal writing.

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluation: Mid-term examination = 45% Final examination = 45% Participation = 10%  
Attendance: Two classes (4 hours), will be permitted without penalty but ALL assignments must still be turned in on the due date. Contact a classmate to get assignments, class notes, handouts, etc. It is expected that you BE PREPARED for the next class.
